message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-10 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue tick 114-120 storage cx-first sweep with 10 more hot-path
siblings from the callsite-count ranking (all 2+ callsites):

1. `mark_action_undone_with_cx(cx, audit_action_id, undone_by)` —
   undo bookkeeping write.
2. `record_usage_metrics_batch_with_cx(cx, records)` — batched
   usage metrics write.
3. `purge_usage_metrics_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — retention write.
4. `purge_notification_history_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — retention
   write.
5. `upsert_action_plan_with_cx(cx, workflow_id, plan)` — workflow
   plan write.
6. `get_sessions_for_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` — per-pane session
   list.
7. `get_max_seq_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` — ingest resume read.
8. `get_active_reservation_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` — pane
   reservation lookup.
9. `list_active_reservations_with_cx(cx)` — full reservation list.
10. `export_reservations_with_cx(cx, query)` — diagnostic export.

All ten are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods.
Strictly additive.

Legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `storage_tick121_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip`
exercises all 10 cx-first siblings on a fresh DB (pane 1 seeded for
FK, workflow seeded for upsert_action_plan FK). All reads return
empty/None, writes verify 0-count or clean insert.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 482/482
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 46/140 methods. Running total
captures startup + top 43 business method callsites (~190 call
sites total); remaining 94 methods all have 1-2 callsites each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
